content.en:
The years have passed, and a long time has passed.

Ye Tian kept shuttling at the end of the realm, shuttling through sixty million realm river years, if he didn't have time, he was not afraid of delaying time, otherwise he would have given up a long time ago.

"This is too far, with my speed, I have traveled to the end of the realm for sixty million realms and river years, and if I am an ordinary eternal controller, I am afraid that it will be an endless time. "

Ye Tian muttered.

However, he felt like he was about to reach his destination.

"I hope there will be a big harvest, otherwise this trip will be in vain!" Ye Tian said expectantly.

It's been another time.

"It's here!"

Ye Tian had already come to the area where he was on the map.

"The energy here ......"

Ye Tian discovered that this place was special, the energy here seemed to be more abundant than the energy of the Origin Realm Sea, and it was easier to absorb.

Although it didn't matter much to a Ten Realm-level controller like Ye Tian, whether he had enough energy or not, for weaker beings, this was definitely a treasure place for cultivation.

Ye Tian stepped into this area and sensed a lot of treasure resources, and of course, he also sensed many powerful creatures, many of which were comparable to the Eternal Controller.

"Don't let these resources be in vain. "

Ye Tian took away these resources one by one, some of them also helped him a little bit, and the treasures that were useless to him could be given to his family and the human race.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian went deep into this area.

Suddenly, Ye Tian's expression changed, and he was immediately ecstatic.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian sensed an attraction, an attraction to copy talent.

He knew exactly what that meant.

That is, the treasure that can upgrade the copy talent has appeared, and he has always wanted to upgrade the copy talent, but he has never found such a treasure.

I didn't expect to come here this time and find it.

What a stroke of luck!

Immediately.

Ye Tian went to that place, but he was cautious, after all, if a terrifying creature that surpassed the Ten Realms level controller appeared here, then he would be finished.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian finally approached the location of the treasure.

And at this time, his copying talent sensed a group of extremely powerful creatures.

This is a race, this group is similar to spiders, but each one is extremely powerful.

"Six masters comparable to the Ten Realms, one of them is much more terrifying than the aura of the Black Ancestor, similar to me, no, a little more powerful than my breath. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

This terrifying creature may be very close to breaking the level of the Ten Realms Masters, between the level of the Ten Realms Masters and the level of the Masters.

After all, theoretically, there is no level above the Ten Realm-level controllers, and everyone is trying their best to break this level, so the strength level is uneven.

If it was said that this spider creature had broken the Ten Realms-level masters, it was not impossible.

In short, it's scary.

And the treasure that Ye Tian needed was exactly within the territory of this race, and once he entered the territory of this race, he would inevitably be attacked by them.

"First condense the will clones, let the will clones attract attention, drag them, and I will take the opportunity to take the treasure!" Ye Tian planned.

Then, somewhere, he began to condense the clone of the will.

After a long time, the will clone was successfully condensed.

Then, Ye Tian asked this will clone to attract the attention of these spider creatures.

Bang!!!

The battle broke out in an instant.

At this moment, hundreds of millions of eyes appeared on the most terrifying spider creature, including red eyes, yellow eyes, and golden eyes......

The dense eyes simultaneously launched hundreds of millions of secret techniques, instantly attacking Ye Tian's copy body.

At the same time, the surrounding time and space were frozen and sealed off layer by layer.

If an ordinary Ten Realms-level master encounters this spider creature, I am afraid that it will be instantaneous, and the defense of the primordial golden light will not be able to withstand it, and it will be torn apart in an instant.

At this time.

Ye Tian's primordial golden light was torn apart by the billions of attacks of this spider creature, but Ye Tian's perfect body resisted its attack.

"The strength is really terrifying!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

In an instant, Ye Tian's combat power was fully opened, and he urged the perfect control technique - Ten Thousand Dao Blades with his perfect body!

Under one blow, Ye Tian directly shattered this piece of space-time, killing one spider creature after another, and the terrifying spider creature was also sent flying by Ye Tian, and cut off one of its spider legs.

However, it recovered instantly, so it was not injured.

But this made it extremely angry and attacked Ye Tian frantically, while several other Ten Realm-level master-level spiders were also attacking on the side.

And Ye Tian retreated while fighting, so that the replicating body had time to act.

These spiders also didn't expect Ye Tian's purpose to be a treasure in their territory, so they directly fought with Ye Tian farther and farther away.

"It's time to act!"

Ye Tian instantly tore through time and space, shuttled in, and had the guidance of the talent of copying, so the goal was very clear, pointing directly to the place where the treasure was.

Without the hindrance of that terrifying creature, Ye Tian easily broke through the layers of space-time barriers and came here.

"Found it!"

Ye Tian saw a golden tree, and a golden fruit bore on the tree, this golden fruit was very small, the size of an adult's palm.

At the end of the realm, such a fruit is naturally a very small fruit.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian couldn't help but have an endless desire in his heart, wanting to devour this fruit.

Obviously, this golden fruit is the item that allows the copying talent to evolve.

Immediately, Ye Tian reached out and grabbed the golden fruit.

And when the golden fruit is taken, the golden tree withers.

At the same time, the spiders went crazy, and even the spider who was fighting against the will immediately turned around.

"This golden fruit seems to be very important to them!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Wow!

Ye Tian quickly escaped, and the will clone dragged these spiders.

With the procrastination of the clone of the will, the replica body escaped easily.

......

Shuttle!

Shuttle!

Shuttle!

Ye Tian kept fleeing from this area, who knows if there will be even more terrifying creatures in this area?

Therefore, he just wants to leave for now, anyway, he has already obtained the item he wants most, so the most important thing is to find a safe place to absorb and refine it, so that the copying talent can evolve to a higher level.

After a long time, Ye Tian was completely free from the pursuit of the group of spiders.

And the clone of the will eventually escaped at the cost of being injured.

Somewhere at the end of the world.

Ye Tian felt that it was relatively peaceful and safe here, so he was ready to absorb and refine that golden fruit here, and he would be relieved if he had completed the evolution of the copying talent as soon as possible.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian swallowed the golden fruit in one gulp and began to refine the golden fruit.

Rumble!!!!!

It was extremely powerful, and the energy beyond Ye Tian's imagination poured into the imprint of the copying talent, and it also came with refining Ye Tian's will.

The metamorphosis of the Copying Talent begins!

At the same time, it was accompanied by unimaginable pain.

But Ye Tian forcibly held back!
